scripts.start:dev:
docker-compose up -d db && npx concurrently "cd server && npm run start:dev" "cd client && npm run dev" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" -n "NEST,VITE" --success first && echo "


 ---> FRONTEND IS RUNNING AT: http://localhost:5173/ <--- 


"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
